verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh Jesus I have promised To serve Thee till the end Be Thou forever near me My Master and my Friend I shall not fear the battle If Thou art by my side Nor wander from the pathway If Thou wilt be my Guide.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh let me feel Thee near me The world is ever near I see the sights that dazzle The tempting sounds I hear My foes are ever near me Around me and within But Jesus draw, Thou nearer And shield my soul from sin.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh let me hear Thee speaking In accents clear and still Above the storms of passion The murmurs of self-will Oh speak to reassure me To hasten or control Oh speak and make me listen Thou Guardian of my soul.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Oh Jesus Thou has promised To all who follow Thee That where Thou art in glory There shall Thy servant be; And Jesus I have promised To serve Thee to the end Oh give me grace to follow My Master and my Friend.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh let me see Thy footmarks And in them plant my own My hope to follow duly Is in Thy Strength alone Oh guide me, call me, draw me, Uphold me to the end Andthen in Heaven receive me My Saviour and my Friend.
